scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p apps/control-api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/shared-flow-spec/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/control-api-contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/domain-connectors/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/runtime-manager/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/adapter-redpanda/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p apps/router-workers/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun run --cwd apps/console typecheck
scripts.verify: bun run check:file-sizes && bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build:console
